name: CLEARONE INC
summary: ClearOne Inc. (CLRO) is a company that develops and sells audio and visual communications solutions. Based on this Item 1 excerpt, specific products and services are not detailed, but the company is engaged in the development, manufacturing, and sale of products related to audio and visual communications, targeting professional markets.
